mapper.select: select payment_id, finance_id, order_id, payment_amount, payment_date, payment_method, payment_account, voucher_no, create_by, create_time, remark from oms_payment where finance_id = #{financeId} and del_flag = '0' order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into oms_payment(finance_id, order_id, payment_amount, payment_date, payment_method, payment_account, voucher_no, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{financeId}, #{orderId}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentDate}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentAccount}, #{voucherNo}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{remark})
